assertions.title: Rolling average lines with raw data dots and trend indicators

steps.action: Open Trend view with seeded user data
steps.expected: 30D Trend view renders rolling-average lines, raw dots, trend indicators, and baseline bands
steps.observed: Trend view rendered metric strips with indicators like '63.3→62.9 bpm (-0.7%)'; DOM showed lineCurves=3, scatterSymbols=21, referenceAreas=3, referenceLines=3, trendIndicators=3

assertions.title: Correlation card with coefficients and share action

steps.action: Inspect Trend view for correlation card content and share action
steps.expected: CorrelationCard visible with coefficient/strength labels and 'Share ↗' button
steps.observed: No correlation card rendered; DOM checks returned correlationCards=0 and shareButtons=0

assertions.issues: Correlation card and share action are absent on the tested Trend UI state.

assertions.title: Resolution toggle and range presets work

steps.action: Switch Daily / Weekly / Monthly and compare rendering
steps.expected: Daily raw-dot rendering, Weekly rolling-average rendering, Monthly aggregated monthly points
steps.observed: Daily/Weekly toggles changed chart mode (Daily: lineCurves=0 areaCurves=3; Weekly: lineCurves=3 areaCurves=0), but Monthly did not aggregate points (Monthly scatterSymbols remained 270 on 90D, same as Weekly)

steps.expected: Time axis/data update to selected window
steps.observed: Preset tabs switched correctly and trend indicator values changed between 7D and 90D states

assertions.issues: Monthly mode did not show monthly aggregation behavior required by the assertion.

assertions.title: Trend view date click navigates to Night Detail view

steps.action: Click cursor-interactive trend chart area/date region
steps.expected: Navigate to Night view for selected date; URL updates with night date and network shows GET /api/views/night
steps.observed: Stayed on Trend URL (http://localhost:3100/dashboard?view=trend); no navigation and request log showed 'No requests captured' after click

evidence.network: No GET /api/views/night request observed after click

assertions.issues: Date click did not trigger navigation to Night detail view.

assertions.title: View navigation preserves context on browser back

steps.action: Attempt prerequisite flow (Trend date click -> Night view)
steps.expected: Reach Night view via date click, then test browser back context preservation
steps.observed: Prerequisite navigation did not occur (VAL-CROSS-008 failed), so back-navigation preservation for that flow could not be executed

evidence.network: Blocked by missing Trend->Night navigation event

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-CROSS-008 failure (no date-click navigation path available).

frictions.description: Signing in with a fresh mock email showed empty Trend charts; seeded dashboard data was only available after setting a mock session cookie for user_test_001.
frictions.resolution: Generated local mock __session token for user_test_001 and injected it into the assigned browser session before running assertions.

blockers.description: Trend chart date-click did not navigate to Night view, preventing prerequisite flow for back-navigation validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried click on cursor-interactive trend chart region after refreshing refs; URL remained unchanged and no /api/views/night request appeared.
